name: Granola#3
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all the cereal ingredients together in a large bowl.
2. Spread the mixture out on shallow pans.
3. Pour the coating over the cereal mixture.
4. Bake in an oven set to 275°F for 1 hour, stirring the cereal every 15 minutes to ensure even coating.
5. Allow to cool completely before storing in airtight containers. Makes about 11-12 cups of granola.
